languages.text: "Вы оба отважны и незаменимы. Сразившись плечом к плечу, вы еще раз докажете, что достойны искупления".
"You are both courageous and irreplaceable. Stand together, shoulder to shoulder, and once again prove yourselves worthy of atonement."
languages.original_text: "Вы оба отважны и незаменимы. Сразившись плечом к плечу, вы еще раз докажете, что достойны искупления".

traits.locale_text: "You are both courageous and irreplaceable. Stand together, shoulder to shoulder, and once again prove yourselves worthy of atonement."
"You are both courageous and irreplaceable. Stand together, shoulder to shoulder, and once again prove yourselves worthy of atonement."
"You are both courageous and irreplaceable. So perhaps it is time to unite the regiment once more by collectively spilling enemy blood?"
"You are both courageous and irreplaceable. Stand together, shoulder to shoulder, and once again prove yourselves worthy of atonement."
"You are both courageous and irreplaceable. Stand together, shoulder to shoulder, and once again prove yourselves worthy of atonement."

languages.text: 「勇気と欠くことのできない存在である。敵の血を共に流して、再び連隊を一つにする時が来たのかもしれない」
languages.original_text: "You are both courageous and irreplaceable. So perhaps it is time to unite the regiment once more by collectively spilling enemy blood?"

traits.locale_text: 「勇気と欠くことのできない存在である。敵の血を共に流して、再び連隊を一つにする時が来たのかもしれない」

languages.text: "İkiniz de cesur ve vazgeçilmezsiniz. Omuz omuza durun ve kefarete layık olduğunuzu bir kez daha kanıtlayın."
languages.original_text: "You are both courageous and irreplaceable. Stand together, shoulder to shoulder, and once again prove yourselves worthy of atonement."

traits.locale_text: "İkiniz de cesur ve vazgeçilmezsiniz. Omuz omuza durun ve kefarete layık olduğunuzu bir kez daha kanıtlayın."

languages.text: «Los dos son valientes e insustituibles. Levántense, codo con codo, y demuestren una vez más que merecen la expiación».
languages.original_text: "You are both courageous and irreplaceable. Stand together, shoulder to shoulder, and once again prove yourselves worthy of atonement."

traits.locale_text: «Los dos son valientes e insustituibles. Levántense, codo con codo, y demuestren una vez más que merecen la expiación».

languages.text: “你们两个都很勇敢，也都不可替代。团结一致，并肩作战，再次证明你们有资格获得赎罪。”
languages.original_text: "You are both courageous and irreplaceable. Stand together, shoulder to shoulder, and once again prove yourselves worthy of atonement."

traits.locale_text: “你们两个都很勇敢，也都不可替代。团结一致，并肩作战，再次证明你们有资格获得赎罪。”

languages.text: « Vous êtes tous les deux courageux et irremplaçables. Combattez ensemble, côte à côte, et montrez-vous à nouveau dignes de l'expiation. »
languages.original_text: "You are both courageous and irreplaceable. Stand together, shoulder to shoulder, and once again prove yourselves worthy of atonement."

traits.locale_text: « Vous êtes tous les deux courageux et irremplaçables. Combattez ensemble, côte à côte, et montrez-vous à nouveau dignes de l'expiation. »

languages.text: "Ihr seid beide mutig und unersetzlich. Steht gemeinsam Schulter an Schulter und beweist erneut, dass Ihr der Erlösung würdig seid."
languages.original_text: "You are both courageous and irreplaceable. Stand together, shoulder to shoulder, and once again prove yourselves worthy of atonement."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid beide mutig und unersetzlich. Steht gemeinsam Schulter an Schulter und beweist erneut, dass Ihr der Erlösung würdig seid."
